top_signals.title: Leveraged ETFs Are Just the Tip of the Iceberg
top_signals.summary: Record leverage is sweeping through the financial system, exposing hedge funds, banks, retail traders and money market funds to potential mounting losses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Germany expands its exoatmospheric missile shield with second Arrow-3 deployment
top_signals.summary: Kaufbeuren will be home to the system’s radar site, while the actual interceptor launchers for that battery are planned for nearby Fliegerhorst Lechfeld.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Fast-Tracks State Company Stake Sales to Cover Oil Shock Costs
top_signals.summary: India is accelerating a plan to sell stakes in major state-held companies as it looks to raise billions of U.S. dollars to plug the gap left by the oil shock from the Strait of Hormuz closure. The Indian government has identified eight state-owned companies in which it would seek stake sales in the coming months, including in major insurers and banks, sources with knowledge of the plan told Bloomberg on Thursday. The proceeds from the stake sales could be worth $1 billion each for some of the biggest firms, such as the biggest life insurer, the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
